slatePreview.slateOverview: Today's slate features several hitter-friendly parks with neutral park factors, highlighted by Truist Park where Drake Baldwin and Michael Harris II face Brayan Bello, who has allowed 71.3 HRs to righties. Citi Field hosts A.J. Ewing and Ben Rice against Elmer Rodríguez and Freddy Peralta, both right-handers with moderate HR vulnerability. Weather angles appear minimal across the board, with focus instead on platoon and recent form advantages.
slatePreview.modelNote: The model is weighting barrel rate, exit velocity, and recent HR trends most heavily today, with Drake Baldwin's top rank driven by his 17.5 barrel rate and 3 HRs in the last 7 days.
